state varchar(50) not null, employee_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table equipment (condition_score numeric(3,2) not null, purchase_date date not null, id uuid not null, state varchar(50) not null, type varchar(50) not null, retire_reason varchar(500), brand varchar(255) not null, model varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table policy_item
